Iman Tunggono — Technology Leader

Iman Tunggono is a technology leader based in Jakarta, Indonesia, focused on
scaling engineering organizations through growth and change. He has over 15
years of experience designing scalable systems, leading high-performing
teams, and aligning technology execution with strategic business goals,
with an emphasis on pragmatic, cost-effective technology strategy.

Career history:
- VP of Engineering at Bobobox (2025-2026): led an organization of 30+
  people across Engineering, IoT, DevOps, and Data.
- Entrepreneur in Residence at Antler (2024): validated early-stage
  technology concepts.
- Head of Engineering at Koinworks (2021-2024): led 50+ engineers across
  5 product streams.
- Senior Principal Engineer at Tiket.com (2019-2021): drove a monolith to
  microservices migration.
- Senior Product Engineer at Gojek (2015-2019): built fraud systems and
  open-sourced BaritoLog.
- Earlier roles (2007-2015) at Entercrews, Phasedev, Citibank, and Bina
  Nusantara University.

Education: Master of Information Systems Management, Bina Nusantara
University (2024).

This page (https://imantung.github.io/) is a single-page professional
profile containing a short bio, career history, selected writing, and
links to LinkedIn, Medium, and GitHub profiles. Contact: iman.tung@gmail.com.
